first impresions: -The UX is amazingly cool -having all the info boxes pre filled, also amazing -having the webflow (awesome for me) but... the API instructions for webflow need to specify what permissions this needs only to create blog post, now im in a dead end here not knowing which permissions are really required and i dont want to give more than what is needed

@rupgo good point. these are the perms: > sites: read > assets: read + write > cms: read + write the agent will be able to auto map the whole thing after our next release btw. Now you need to map the fields manually

results.title: Grocliq: Automate Your SEO Process, Amplify Your Organic Growth. | Product Hunt
results.content:
Launched on November 28th, 2024

Grocliq

GrocliqAutomate Your SEO, Amplify Your Growth.

Launched on September 24th, 2024

4.9

Based on 22 reviews

Review Grocliq?

Reviewers describe Grocliq as a practical SEO tool that saves time and makes core work easier to manage. The most repeated praise centers on keyword research, site audits, rank tracking, Google Search Console integration, competitor analysis, and backlink management, with many saying the recommendations are clear and actionable. Several users, especially beginners, call it intuitive and easy to learn, while more advanced users value the reporting and technical SEO checks. Negative feedback is essentially absent in the written reviews, so the picture is strongly one-sided and mostly positive.
